summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Load Balancer & Throttling implementation for LM Studio requests. All backend and frontend features working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend load_balancer.py module exists with ThrottleConfig, get_throttle_config, execute_with_throttle
get_throttle_config returns max_concurrent=4 for openrouter mode
get_throttle_config returns max_concurrent=1 for lmstudio mode by default
openrouter.py uses execute_with_throttle instead of asyncio.gather
Throttle config is properly saved and retrieved via API
AdvancedPanel shows Performance & Throttling section in lmstudio mode
AdvancedPanel hides Performance & Throttling section in openrouter mode
AdvancedPanel shows Performance & Throttling section in hybrid mode
Safe preset sets maxConcurrent=1, delay=2s, timeout=300s correctly
Fast preset sets maxConcurrent=4, delay=0s, timeout=120s correctly
Sliders for maxConcurrent, delayBetweenRequests, requestTimeout are functional
Throttle config is included in advanced settings sent to backend
Advanced configuration saving and loading works properly
